prompt: Determine whether the work meets the applicable code, spec, drawing, or manufacturer requirement.
scenario: In a T4 work setting, the evaluated element is X-105 PPE selection within 2.12 Safety & Rigging. The relevant subcategory is 2.10.4 Quality Inspection. The observed field condition is: respirator wrong cartridge color (ID). The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors NFPA 70E, OSHA 1910 Subpart I.
title: T4 X-105 Code/spec compliance
